prompt: With the development of technologies, people got many convenient ways of communication, and nowadays it's impossible to imagine our life without social media and messengers. And many of us believe that it makes it easier to maintain relationships with others. To my mid, modern online services can indeed help us keep in touch much easier than it used to be. For example, internet allows us to quickly reach anyone in any part of the world. That's why we can keep our relationships with someone far away. In addition, with various popular social media, talking to strangers and meeting new people is easier as well. On the other hand, some would mention, that in modern society we often lack face-face communication, and interacting with each other in person becomes more unnatural for us. Overall, I still believe that internet is a great invention, and online relationships make our life much easier and give us plenty of opportunities.

messages.content:
You are an expert CEFR writing assessor.
Assess the student text using the provided task/context blocks as supporting evidence.
Use EXPERT_ANNOTATION, CALIBRATION_EXAMPLES, RETRIEVED_ERROR_SPANS, and RANKING_ANCHORS only as supporting context; never override direct evidence from the student text.
Return ONLY one CEFR label from: A1|A2|B1|B2|C1|C2.
Do not output JSON.
Do not output explanation.

TASK: How easy or difficult is building a relationship online?
STUDENT_TEXT: With the development of technologies, people got many convenient ways of communication, and nowadays it's impossible to imagine our life without social media and messengers. And many of us believe that it makes it easier to maintain relationships with others. To my mid, modern online services can indeed help us keep in touch much easier than it used to be. For example, internet allows us to quickly reach anyone in any part of the world. That's why we can keep our relationships with someone far away. In addition, with various popular social media, talking to strangers and meeting new people is easier as well. On the other hand, some would mention, that in modern society we often lack face-face communication, and interacting with each other in person becomes more unnatural for us. Overall, I still believe that internet is a great invention, and online relationships make our life much easier and give us plenty of opportunities.
TEXT_TYPE: essay

There are many people with the same talents and only the hard work can allow to win in this competition of talents. First and foremost, there are a cases when the person have some talent but not reach a success. My brother was a scientist and he had dreamed about studing in the prestigious foreign university. He was not silly çat all. His inteligence quality score is one hundred and fourty two. But he was lazy and he had not practiced with math. Thus, he had not passed math exam in any foreign university, but it was possible. Last but not the least, some people want to realise their dream so much that any negative circumstances cannot stop it. When my mother was a kid she wanted about be a doctor. Her dream was to be a surgeon, bur she had the disease with hand which made impossible her plans about profession. Surpisingly, now she is a surgeon. Write an answer to this post (10 sentences) and give some tips on how to organise your days to have more free time.","student_text":"Hi, im styduing in the MIPT - in one of the hardest technical universitiyes in Russia, and i want to give you some advices.

My first advidce - it to sleep from 7 to 9 hours (how much exactly depends from you) in day, and you should stand from up and go to bed in one time in day. With sleeping regulary in one time you will feel better and maybe you will feel better.

Next advice - it to make calendar with notions, or something like this, it helps to plan day wery succesfull. Sometimes procrastination wins you, but with notions it weel be easier to make hometasks in time.

The third advice - food delivery, if you have not enought time to cook something, or to go somewhere in big sity you can easily get food from delivery services. But sometimes people eats only food from delivery, and even don't go out from their rooms, of course it isn't good.

And the last what i want to say - probably your biggest troubles with time it that you have not hard character. Without this super ability it hard to self-controle, may be you should to ask your friends wathching what are you doing in free time, they can anounce if you spend time on games or other time-killers.
